grit.mission: Definitive, self-updating warehouse of Southern Nevada economic activity. Chain EVENT -> ENTITY -> MONEY into acquisition intelligence for one operator. Southern Nevada only. Out-of-state OWNER data = capital-origin intelligence, never geographic expansion.

doctrine.rule: No synthetic data. Empty states OK; fabricated coords/values/owners forbidden.
Append-only warehouse. Records never deleted; absent ones marked dormant.
Transparent scoring. Every score ships signals[] with point values.
Four location dimensions never collapsed: property_city, permit_jurisdiction, owner_mailing, owner_origin_market.
Date-first. primary_date, age_days, temporal_state on every lead.
Confidence measured per field: authoritative/derived/inferred/unknown + source + method.
Free data first. Zero paid infra. Paid sources documented, chosen deliberately.

infra.host: GitHub Pages (static single-page console at docs/index.html)
infra.compute: GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/harvest.yml) runs the harvest on a cron and commits docs/data
infra.language: Python 3 standard library only (no third-party deps; requirements.txt minimal)
infra.storage: Flat JSON in docs/data (no database, no server)

package.name: grit
package.module: All endpoints, caps, field hints, item ids. Edit here to tune.
harvest() orchestrator: parcels -> cards -> permit merge -> free saturation -> geocode+enrich -> score -> enrich_lead -> warehouse -> coverage. Also score_card(), feature_to_card().
Batched parcel-layer query: APN -> centroid AND attributes (parcels_for_apns, enrich_from_parcels). Full-roll enrichment, no scraping.
0.109 free saturation: resolve ArcGIS item ids -> layers, paginate, map fields, emit events + distress leads + signals. Fail-safe per source.
City of Las Vegas permits (ArcGIS Hub) -> events + cards.
SoNV coverage, source inventory+feasibility, signal matrix, denominators (breadth/depth), coverage_reality, confidence, ownership networks, gap analysis.
Namespaced tags (trade:, distress:, signal:, origin:, urgency:, jurisdiction: ...).
enrich_lead(): location dims, origin, dates, why, confidence annotate.
CLI: selftest (offline fixture), rebuild (recompute from existing data), harvest (live).

architecture.console: Single HTML file, Leaflet map, CARTO tiles. No build step. No localStorage/sessionStorage (forbidden). Reads docs/data/*.json.

live.source: Clark County parcel layer (GISMO/AssessorMap FeatureServer): geometry + owner + mailing + land-use. NOT value/sqft/beds.
City of Las Vegas Building Permits (ArcGIS Hub, item OpenData_Building_Permits_): all permit types, the live activity feed.
CLV Code Enforcement Violations (ArcGIS item f48d19416d5546e5b9ee12f9746ecaa9): violation type+status+APN+coords since 2015. Distress signal + new leads. WIRED 0.109.
CLV Business Licenses (ArcGIS item f6b923ee5eb9450baf6adebaf0f307ed): name+type+status+activity+location, daily. Commercial/entity signal. WIRED 0.109.

free_ready.source: LVMPD crime open data (opendata-lvmpd.hub.arcgis.com): area signal. Set config.LVMPD_CRIME_ITEM to activate.
Henderson 90-day crime search; CLV Zoning FeatureServer — candidates.

paid.source: Clark County Assessor AOEXTRACT (ownership+value) + AORES (sqft/beds/baths): the ONLY route to parcel-level DEPTH. Subscription via signed letter, weekly bulk files. 702-455-3882.
ATTOM / Regrid: commercial turnkey parcel+permit+value API.

no_free_api.source: Henderson / North Las Vegas / Clark County permits — Accela Citizen Access (aca-prod.accela.com/clarkco), BuildZoom. No clean free API.
Clark County Recorder distress (NOD/trustee/lis pendens) — document search, bulk access restricted.
Nevada SOS business registry (SilverFlume/ORION) — bulk access unverified.

coverage_state.breadth: ~4,900 parcels held vs ~900,000 county roll (~0.27%); cap is self-imposed, raisable (free). ~4,898 mapped. 13 of 19 target jurisdictions carry data.
coverage_state.depth: owner_name ~99.9% (free layer); assessed_value ~3.2%, building_sqft ~0% (paid-gated). Confidence distribution ~17% authoritative / ~67% unknown — the unknowns are the paid-only depth fields.
coverage_state.permits: City of Las Vegas captured comprehensively (all types). Other jurisdictions pending (Accela). True all-permit universe is not published; Census counts new-residential only (~16k/yr Clark).
coverage_state.warehouse: ~7,000+ records tracked append-only; ~18 harvest snapshots; ~331 contractors.

operations.command: Offline fixture test (never writes docs/data). Must exit 0.
Recompute all docs/data outputs from existing harvested data, offline. Must exit 0.
LIVE harvest against county/city/free sources. Runs in the GitHub Action (needs network).
operations.verify: After backend changes: selftest exit 0, rebuild exit 0, console JS node --check, zero browser-storage APIs, all coverage.json audit keys present.

assistant_constraints.note: The build sandbox CANNOT reach county/state/ArcGIS endpoints (only github/pypi/npm). Use web_search/web_fetch for research. Coverage NUMBERS move only when the operator runs a harvest.
Recurring: uploaded repos revert .github/workflows/harvest.yml to `git add docs/data/*.json`; re-apply `git add docs/data` so the warehouse subdir persists.
Do not regenerate canonical docs (this file, MANIFESTO, README) on every change. Keep code changes minimal and focused on what was requested.
Build new source connectors fail-safe (flexible field hints, graceful failure) since they cannot be tested live here; validate pure functions via selftest with synthetic records.

next_targets.target: Wire LVMPD crime (set LVMPD_CRIME_ITEM) -> Crime signal green.
Raise parcel breadth further; consider slim records / tiles past ~10-15k pins.
Subscribe to Assessor AOEXTRACT + AORES for parcel-level value/sqft/beds DEPTH.
Henderson/NLV/County permits via Accela (scrape or paid feed).
Recorder distress + NV SOS business graph — feasibility.
